dialogueChunks.intro: The hunt is over, {player_name}. You managed to {quest_action}, and the {quest_threat} will not trouble us again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_has} been recovered, and the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} secure once more. {quest_ally} is already spreading the word.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your persistence made all the difference. Few would have followed this trail to the end.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you did what no one else could. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} been dealt with, and the {quest_focus} is back where it belongs.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I must admit, when the trail went cold I thought we had lost. But you kept going. You are owed more than I can express for saving the {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.outro: You have earned a reputation here. People know: you finish what you start.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is done, {player_name}. After all that effort to {quest_action}, the pursuit has finally ended.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_threat} underestimated your tenacity. The {quest_focus} stands safe, and the {quest_stakes} can breathe easy again.
dialogueChunks.outro: The settlement will remember your name. Thank you for seeing this through.
